title: refactor: use serde_json in gcp-sm GET instead of custom navigator
description: gcp-sm GET uses extract_path_field (secretx-core custom navigator) plus manual base64 decode to avoid serde_json allocations. But resp.bytes() returns bytes::Bytes not zeroed on drop — the full JSON response already leaks. The custom navigator prevents additional allocations on top of an already-leaked copy. Replace with serde_json::from_slice + standard base64 decode. Also replace the hand-rolled JSON string builder in PUT with serde_json. Add serde_json as an explicit dependency (currently avoided but the leak makes it pointless to avoid).
